summary: LiveKit Live Streaming Integration - All tests passing. Backend: 8/8 tests pass (status, start-stream, active-streams, end-stream, token generation). Frontend: Go Live button visible on Profile page, GoLiveModal opens with LIVE indicator, timer, viewer count, End Live button, mic/camera toggles.
critical_code_review_comments: LiveKit status endpoint VERIFIED: Returns configured=true with server_url=wss://raw-surf-app-ic8zq734.livekit.cloud
Start-stream endpoint VERIFIED: Creates stream, returns stream_id, room_name, JWT token, server_url
End-stream endpoint VERIFIED: Returns success=true with duration_seconds and peak_viewers
Active-streams endpoint VERIFIED: Returns streams array with broadcaster info
Go Live button VERIFIED: Profile.js line 666-677 - Yellow/amber gradient button with Radio icon
GoLiveModal VERIFIED: Full-screen modal with LiveKit integration
LIVE indicator VERIFIED: Red pulsing badge in top-left corner
Timer VERIFIED: Shows stream duration in MM:SS format
Viewer count VERIFIED: Shows number of viewers
End Live button VERIFIED: Red button at bottom center
Mic/Camera toggles VERIFIED: Control buttons for audio/video
Connection error toast is EXPECTED in headless browser (no camera/mic access)
context_for_next_testing_agent: LiveKit integration fully tested. Backend endpoints: /api/livekit/status (returns configured:true), /api/livekit/start-stream (creates room, returns JWT token), /api/livekit/end-stream/{id} (ends stream), /api/livekit/active-streams (lists live streams), /api/livekit/token (generates viewer/broadcaster tokens). Frontend: Go Live button on Profile page opens GoLiveModal with LiveKit React components. Connection error in headless browser is expected (no camera/mic).

features_verified.livekit_start_stream_endpoint: VERIFIED - Creates stream, returns stream_id, room_name, JWT token, server_url
features_verified.livekit_end_stream_endpoint: VERIFIED - Returns {success: true, stream_id, duration_seconds, peak_viewers}
features_verified.profile_go_live_button: VERIFIED - Yellow/amber gradient button with Radio icon, data-testid='go-live-btn'
features_verified.go_live_modal_opens: VERIFIED - Full-screen black modal with LiveKit integration
features_verified.live_indicator: VERIFIED - Red pulsing LIVE badge in top-left
features_verified.viewer_count: VERIFIED - Shows viewer count with Users icon
features_verified.end_live_button: VERIFIED - Red button at bottom center
features_verified.close_button: VERIFIED - X button in top-right with data-testid='close-live-btn'

livekit_integration_notes: LiveKit Cloud is a REAL integration (not mocked). Uses livekit-api Python SDK for backend token generation. Frontend uses @livekit/components-react for video room. JWT tokens have 1-hour TTL for streams, 10-minute TTL for regular tokens.
